notes: /api/v1/stats does NOT exist on production webcash.org. Returns plain Tornado 404.
The stats endpoint exists in the current webycash-server crate (server-side extension).
DECISION FOR M1: Webcash flavor of new server must EITHER hide /api/v1/stats OR document the /stats endpoint as a Webycash-specific extension that production webcash.org does not provide.
No CORS or HSTS headers on this 404 (Tornado default 404 path).
